title: 2 Blade Potato Chipper
description: STAINLESS POTATO CHIPPER FRENCH FIRES SLICER CHIP CUTTER CHOPPER MAKER 2 BLADES The cutter can also be used to create vegetable strips such as carrot sticks. Made from high quality stainless steel, the cutter is easy to clean, and features a rubber suction pad to grip work surfaces when in use.
